name: 750+ Credit Repair Philadelphia PA
description_short: 750 Credit Group disputes errors and negative items on credit reports with a 150-point warranty guaranteeing results within 90 days or your money back.
description_long:
750 Credit Group is a credit repair company operating under the service model of disputing inaccurate items on consumer credit reports. The company positions itself as a solution for individuals with damaged credit seeking to improve their scores and financial standing.

The company offers a core credit repair service built on a three-step process: Review (identifying negative or unfair accounts), Dispute (challenging erroneous items with credit bureaus), and Follow Up (30-day check-ins with clients and bureaus). They claim to have helped thousands of clients improve credit scores by at least 150 points within 90 days. The service includes free initial assessment and consultation with no money down to start. Clients can access dispute resolution directly with the three major credit bureaus (TransUnion, Equifax, Experian).

What distinguishes 750 Credit Group is their stated 150-point warranty—a performance guarantee that sets them apart from traditional month-to-month credit repair models. They emphasize no ongoing subscription fees with "no end in sight" and claim faster results (6x-12x faster than standard approaches). The company also highlights assistance in building positive credit history alongside dispute work. Client testimonials reference qualification for home loans in 60 days and successful outcomes after prior failed attempts with other credit companies.

Key caveats: All claims are contingent on warranty terms and client permission to dispute. The 150-point improvement within 90 days is marked with an asterisk noting conditions apply. No independent verification of these warranty results is provided on the website. The company operates nationwide from a Utah phone number (435 area code) despite the Philadelphia, PA branding in the business listing. Clients should verify regulatory compliance and warranty terms before engaging.
pros: 150-point warranty guarantees minimum credit score improvement or conditions apply, reducing financial risk for clients
No money down to start and no month-to-month fees, only paying when results are delivered
Free initial credit assessment and consultation to review reports from all three major bureaus
Three-step RDF process (Review, Dispute, Follow Up) with 30-day check-ins and ongoing bureau communication
Claims 6x-12x faster results compared to standard credit repair timelines
Assistance with building positive credit history alongside dispute resolution
Client testimonials documenting qualification for home loans and successful outcomes
cons: All performance claims carry asterisks with contingencies and warranty terms not fully detailed on website
No pricing information disclosed; actual cost structure and payment terms are hidden behind lead form
Company uses Utah phone number (435) despite Philadelphia PA branding, raising questions about actual service location
No mention of regulatory compliance, licensing, or bonding information for credit repair operations
Client testimonials lack details (no dates, verification mechanism, or specificity beyond first names and initials)
best_for: Consumers with multiple errors or inaccurate negative items on credit reports seeking guaranteed dispute results
Individuals denied credit or facing higher interest rates who want rapid score improvement within 90 days
People preparing for major purchases (home, auto) who need credit score improvement on a timeline
diagnosis: 750 Credit Group is best for consumers with verifiable errors on their credit reports who want a performance-backed dispute service and need rapid score improvement. The main caveat is that all warranty claims are conditional, pricing is undisclosed until lead submission, and regulatory/licensing information is absent from their marketing materials—consumers should request full terms and verify compliance before committing.
services: Free credit assessment and consultation with no upfront cost
Review of credit reports from TransUnion, Equifax, and Experian
Identification of errors, discrepancies, and inaccurate items on credit reports
Dispute filing and resolution with credit bureaus for negative items
Direct communication and negotiation with credit bureaus on client behalf
Customized credit repair plan tailored to individual situation
30-day follow-up check-ins with clients and credit bureaus
Credit building assistance to establish positive credit history
Client login portal access for account management
